name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality is external_body and forces intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — two distinct closures agreeing on all inputs are collapsed to structurally equal

name: suffix_zero_equals_self
reason: ex.suffix(0) creates a new closure |i| f(i+0) intensionally distinct from ex — execution_equality silently equates these without proof, papering over the intensional/extensional gap

name: suffix_composition_equals_addition
reason: doubly-nested suffix creates a closure intensionally distinct from single-offset suffix — execution_equality collapses them without proof, and always_implies_preserved_by_always depends on this at the key composition step

name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging the intensional gap between p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) (which wraps in TempPred::new) and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: always_unfold_intensional_bridge
reason: always_unfold is external_body bridging the forall embedded in always's TempPred::new closure and a bare forall in the ensures — these are intensionally distinct formulations that the axiom equates without proof
